description: Lock the 2026-06-27 charcoal_pit_kilns correction to traditional earth-covered pit and mound charcoal carbonization rather than generic hearth charcoal or modern retorts.

checks.reason: The node now uses a conservative ancient-history anchor with explicit uncertainty instead of the Ancient era default placeholder.
Earth pits and mounds are specific systems for producing charcoal, so charcoal production remains the direct process capability.
General fire control predates and contextualizes controlled carbonization but is not by itself the pit-kiln process.
Basic wood cutting and stacking is prerequisite craft background rather than the distinctive carbonization method.
